title: Effect of Electronic Nursing Documentation Systems on Patient Safety Outcomes
author: Hassan Aljomaie
materials: Formal screening of search results against eligibility criteria.

steps.title: Records managed via reference software; screening...
steps.instruction: Records managed via reference software; screening and extraction conducted independently by two reviewers using standardized forms.

steps.title: ROBINS-I for non-randomized studies and Cochrane...
steps.instruction: ROBINS-I for non-randomized studies and Cochrane RoB 2 for randomized studies.

steps.title: Random-effects meta-analysis using OR and SMD...
steps.instruction: Random-effects meta-analysis using OR and SMD where applicable; otherwise narrative synthesis.

steps.title: By outcome type and study design...
steps.instruction: By outcome type and study design where sufficient data are available.

steps.title: Excluding high risk of bias and borderline studies where applicable
steps.instruction: Excluding high risk of bias and borderline studies where applicable.

steps.title: Results will be published in a...
steps.instruction: Results will be published in a peer-reviewed journal and presented at conferences.
